h1: 17.9 Cu.Ft Side by Side Refrigerator with Smart Inverter Compressor (LS19GBBDI)

gallery.a: Front view of LG 17.9 Cu.Ft Side by Side Refrigerator in Silver (LS19GBBDI)
Front view with both doors open

modules.head: Energy Efficient & Durable
modules.body: LG's Smart Inverter Compressor adjusts cooling power continuously to match real-time demand — delivering energy savings, quieter operation and long-lasting reliability. Backed by LG's 10-year compressor warranty.
modules.disc: *10-year limited warranty on the Smart Inverter Compressor. Terms and conditions apply.

imgs.a: LG 17.9 Cu.Ft Side by Side Refrigerator — Smart Inverter Compressor

modules.head: Seals in Farm Freshness Longer
modules.body: LINEAR Cooling™ minimises temperature fluctuations inside the cabinet, helping vegetables, dairy and proteins stay fresher longer with reduced moisture loss.

imgs.a: Interior of LS19GBBDI keeping food fresh with LINEAR Cooling

modules.head: Generous Family-Sized Storage
modules.body: A spacious 17.9 Cu.Ft (~510L) side-by-side layout organises groceries neatly with well-planned shelves and compartments — easy access on both fresh and frozen sides for weekly family shopping.

modules.head: Sleek Silver Finish
modules.body: Premium Silver finish complements modern kitchens with a clean, timeless look. Ergonomic handles and a flush front make this side-by-side blend seamlessly into your space.

modules.head: SASO-Certified Efficiency
modules.body: Certified by SASO (Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization) for energy performance in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
